summary.zh: F1 史上第一辆采用全碳纤维单体壳的赛车。约翰·巴纳德设计、大力神公司生产，MP4/1 比铝合金车架更轻更硬，1981 年起开启了碳纤维时代——今天所有 F1 赛车仍是它的后代。
summary.en: The first F1 car built around a full carbon-fibre monocoque. Designed by John Barnard and produced with Hercules, the MP4/1 was lighter and stiffer than aluminium and, from 1981, opened the carbon era—every F1 car since is its descendant.

chassis.zh: 全碳纤维单体壳（F1 首创）

heading.en: Building the body from carbon fibre

content.zh:
1981 年之前，F1 的单体壳主要是铆接铝合金。迈凯伦的设计主管约翰·巴纳德想做一次更大的跃迁：用碳纤维复合材料制造整个承载车身。他与美国大力神公司合作，把碳纤维预浸料按受力方向层层铺叠，抽真空后送入热压罐固化，得到一具比铝更轻、扭转刚度远超以往的整体壳体。

MP4/1 不只是更快，也更安全：碳壳在碰撞中能以受控方式溃缩吸能，比铝合金更可预测。约翰·沃森驾驶它在 1981 年英国大奖赛夺冠，证明碳纤维赛车不仅能跑，还能赢。

这是一个真正的分水岭。几年之内，所有 F1 车队都改用了碳纤维单体壳；到今天，承载式碳壳已成为 F1、顶级跑车与赛车的事实标准。
content.en:
Before 1981, F1 monocoques were largely riveted aluminium. McLaren's design chief John Barnard wanted a bigger leap: a load-bearing body made entirely of carbon-fibre composite. Working with Hercules in the United States, carbon prepreg was laid sheet by sheet in chosen stress directions, vacuum-bagged and autoclave-cured into a unit lighter than aluminium and far stiffer in torsion.

The MP4/1 was not just faster but safer: the carbon tub absorbs crash energy in a more controlled, predictable way than aluminium. John Watson won the 1981 British Grand Prix in it, proving a carbon car could both run and win.

It was a true watershed. Within a few seasons every F1 team had switched to carbon monocoques, and today the structural carbon tub is the de facto standard for F1, top supercars and racing machinery.
